name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

VARIABLES
  proc,      \* Process identifier
  state,     \* State of each process
  turn,      \* Turn variable for Peterson's algorithm
  flag,      \* Flag array for each process

N == 5   \* Number of processes

State == {"idle", "trying", "critical"}

Init ==
  /\ proc \in 1..N
  /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
  /\ turn = 1
  /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next ==
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ proc' = i
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
       /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
       /\ turn' = i
       /\ UNCHANGED << state, turn, flag >>
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ proc' = i
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
       /\ UNCHANGED << turn, flag >>
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ proc' = i
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
       /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
       /\ UNCHANGED << turn, flag >>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<proc, state, turn, flag>>

TypeOK ==
  /\ proc \in 1..N
  /\ state \in [1..N -> State]
  /\ turn \in 1..N
  /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

MutualExclusion ==
  \A i, j \in 1..N : i /= j => state[i] /= "critical" /\ state[j] /= "critical"

SpecCorrect == Spec /\ MutualExclusion

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS
  Participants,
  Coordinator,
  Prepare,
  VoteYes,
  VoteNo,
  Commit,
  Abort

VARIABLES
  state,
  msg

TypeOK ==
  /\ state \in [Participants -> {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}]
  /\ msg \in [Participants -> Seq({Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort})]

Init ==
  /\ state = [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
  /\ msg = [p \in Participants |-> <<>>]

PrepareMsg(p) ==
  /\ state[p] = "Init"
  /\ msg[p] = <<Prepare>> \/
  /\ state[p] = "Prepared"
  /\ msg[p] = <<Prepare, Commit>>

VoteYesMsg(p) ==
  /\ state[p] = "Prepared"
  /\ msg[p] = <<Prepare, VoteYes>> \/
  /\ state[p] = "Committed"
  /\ msg[p] = <<Prepare, VoteYes, Commit>>

VoteNoMsg(p) ==
  /\ state[p] = "Prepared"
  /\ msg[p] = <<Prepare, VoteNo>> \/
  /\ state[p] = "Aborted"
  /\ msg[p] = <<Prepare, VoteNo, Abort>>

CommitMsg(p) ==
  /\ state[p] = "Committed"
  /\ msg[p] = <<Prepare, Commit>>

AbortMsg(p) ==
  /\ state[p] = "Aborted"
  /\ msg[p] = <<Prepare, Abort>>

ParticipantMsg(p) ==
  /\ state[p] = "Committed"
  \/ state[p] = "Aborted"

CoordinatorMsg ==
  /\ \A p \in Participants : msg[p] = <<Prepare, VoteYes>>
  \/ \A p \in Participants : msg[p] = <<Prepare, VoteNo>>

PrepareStep ==
  /\ \E p \in Participants : PrepareMsg(p)
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Prepared"]
  /\ UNCHANGED msg

VoteYesStep ==
  /\ \E p \in Participants : VoteYesMsg(p)
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Committed"]
  /\ UNCHANGED msg

VoteNoStep ==
  /\ \E p \in Participants : VoteNoMsg(p)
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Aborted"]
  /\ UNCHANGED msg

CommitStep ==
  /\ \E p \in Participants : CommitMsg(p)
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Committed"]
  /\ UNCHANGED msg

AbortStep ==
  /\ \E p \in Participants : AbortMsg(p)
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Aborted"]
  /\ UNCHANGED msg

Next ==
  \/ PrepareStep
  \/ VoteYesStep
  \/ VoteNoStep
  \/ CommitStep
  \/ AbortStep

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, msg>>

---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Num == 1..N

Choose(i) == CHOOSE j \in 1..N : \A k \in 1..N : num[i][k] # j

Init == /\ num = [i \in Num |-> [j \in Num |-> 0]]
/\ flag = [i \in Num |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in Num :
/\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
/\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = [j \in Num |-> IF flag[i] THEN Choose(i) ELSE 0]]
/\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

TypeOK == /\ num \in [Num -> [Num -> Nat]]
